history.text: Unification of Upper and Lower Egypt appears in Egypt's historical record.
Fatimid Caliphate ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Ayyubid dynasty inaugurated ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Mamluk Egypt appears in Egypt's historical record.
Alawiyya dynasty inaugurated ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
A declaration of independence was issued, making sovereignty the central political claim.
The Revolution Day reshaped Egypt's political life.
A republic was declared, changing Egypt's political system and state identity.
